__inputs.name: DS_CLICKHOUSE
__inputs.label: ClickHouse datasource
__inputs.description: ClickHouse data source that can read the nauthilus.logins table.

description: Nauthilus login analytics directly from the ClickHouse logins table: outcome, identity risk, source reputation, protocol mix, latency, and defense signals.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS "Attempts" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT countIf(authenticated = 1) AS "Successful" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT countIf(authenticated = 0) AS "Failed" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT if(count() = 0, 0, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 1) / count(), 2)) AS "Success rate" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT uniqExactIf(if(username != '', username, account), username != '' OR account != '') AS "Unique users" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS "Unique IPs" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT if(count() = 0, 0, quantileTDigest(0.95)(latency)) AS "P95 latency" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT countIf(decision_sources != '' OR prot_active = 1 OR dyn_threat > 0 OR brute_force_counter > 0 OR failed_login_count > 0 OR repeating = 1 OR rwp = 1) AS "Defense events" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT time, outcome, attempts FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, multiIf(authenticated = 1, 'success', authenticated = 0, 'failed', 'unknown') AS outcome, count() AS attempts FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time, outcome) ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, quantileTDigest(0.50)(latency) AS p50, quantileTDigest(0.95)(latency) AS p95, quantileTDigest(0.99)(latency) AS p99 FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, if(count() = 0, 0, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 1) / count(), 2)) AS "success_rate" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, status_class, requests FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, if(http_status = 0, 'none', concat(toString(intDiv(http_status, 100)), 'xx')) AS status_class, count() AS requests FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time, status_class) ORDER BY time

SELECT concat(if(proto = '', 'unknown', proto), ' / ', if(method = '', 'unknown', method)) AS slice, count() AS attempts FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY slice ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT if(username = '', if(account = '', 'unknown', account), username) AS identity, count() AS failures, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, max(failed_login_count) AS max_failed_count, max(failed_login_rank) AS best_failed_rank, argMax(status_msg, ts) AS latest_status FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND authenticated = 0 GROUP BY identity ORDER BY failures DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT client_ip, argMax(geoip_country, ts) AS country, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 0) / count(), 2) AS failure_rate, uniqExactIf(username, username != '') AS identities, max(dyn_threat) AS max_threat, max(prot_delay_ms) AS max_delay_ms FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND client_ip != '' GROUP BY client_ip ORDER BY failures DESC, attempts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.description: Country-level login outcome map. Marker size follows total attempts; marker color uses a colorblind-friendly blue/yellow/orange/purple scale for failed-login percentage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT geoip_country AS lookup, geoip_country AS country, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 1) AS successful, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failed, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 0) / count(), 2) AS failure_rate, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, uniqExactIf(if(username != '', username, account), username != '' OR account != '') AS identities, max(dyn_threat) AS max_threat FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND geoip_country != '' GROUP BY geoip_country ORDER BY failed DESC, attempts DESC LIMIT 250

panels.title: Country outcome world map

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(geoip_country = '', 'unknown', geoip_country) AS country, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY country ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT time, user_state, attempts FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, multiIf(user_found = 1, 'known user', user_found = 0, 'unknown user', 'not reported') AS user_state, count() AS attempts FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time, user_state) ORDER BY time

SELECT if(user_agent = '', 'unknown', user_agent) AS user_agent, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 0) / count(), 2) AS failure_rate, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY user_agent ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT time, source, events FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, arrayJoin(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', splitByChar(',', decision_sources))) AS source, count() AS events FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND decision_sources != '' GROUP BY time, source) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, signal, events FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, 'account protection' AS signal, countIf(prot_active = 1) AS events FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, 'dynamic response' AS signal, countIf(dyn_threat > 0 OR dyn_response != '') AS events FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, 'brute force' AS signal, countIf(brute_force_counter > 0 OR failed_login_count > 0 OR brute_force_bucket != '') AS events FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, 'repeat/replay' AS signal, countIf(repeating = 1 OR rwp = 1) AS events FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time) WHERE events > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT if(brute_force_bucket = '', 'none', brute_force_bucket) AS bucket, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures, max(brute_force_counter) AS max_counter, max(failed_login_count) AS max_failed_count, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, uniqExactIf(username, username != '') AS identities FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (brute_force_bucket != '' OR brute_force_counter > 0 OR failed_login_count > 0) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY failures DESC, attempts DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT if(dyn_response = '', 'none', dyn_response) AS response, if(prot_reason = '', 'none', prot_reason) AS protection_reason, count() AS events, max(dyn_threat) AS max_threat, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, quantileTDigest(0.95)(prot_delay_ms) AS p95_delay_ms FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (dyn_threat > 0 OR dyn_response != '' OR prot_active = 1) GROUP BY response, protection_reason ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT multiIf(oidc_cid != '', concat('oidc:', oidc_cid), saml_entity_id != '', concat('saml:', saml_entity_id), 'none') AS client, if(grant_type = '', 'n/a', grant_type) AS grant_type, if(mfa_method = '', 'none', mfa_method) AS mfa_method, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 1) AS successful, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failed, uniqExactIf(username, username != '') AS users FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (oidc_cid != '' OR saml_entity_id != '' OR grant_type != '' OR mfa_method != '') GROUP BY client, grant_type, mfa_method ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT ts AS time, service, proto, method, if(username = '', account, username) AS identity, client_ip, geoip_country AS country, multiIf(authenticated = 1, 'success', authenticated = 0, 'failed', 'unknown') AS outcome, http_status, status_msg, latency, decision_sources, brute_force_counter, failed_login_count, dyn_threat, prot_reason, prot_delay_ms, rwp, repeating, session FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (authenticated = 0 OR decision_sources != '' OR dyn_threat > 0 OR prot_active = 1 OR brute_force_counter > 0 OR failed_login_count > 0 OR rwp = 1 OR repeating = 1) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT ${table_page_size:raw} OFFSET (${table_page:raw} - 1) * ${table_page_size:raw}

SELECT ts AS time, service, proto, method, if(username = '', account, username) AS identity, client_ip, geoip_country AS country, multiIf(authenticated = 1, 'success', authenticated = 0, 'failed', 'unknown') AS outcome, http_status, status_msg, latency, decision_sources, user_agent FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT ${table_page_size:raw} OFFSET (${table_page:raw} - 1) * ${table_page_size:raw}

list.definition: SELECT service FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND service != '' GROUP BY service ORDER BY service
list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT service FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND service != '' GROUP BY service ORDER BY service

list.definition: SELECT proto FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND proto != '' GROUP BY proto ORDER BY proto
list.label: Protocol
list.name: proto
list.query: SELECT proto FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND proto != '' GROUP BY proto ORDER BY proto

list.definition: SELECT method FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND method != '' GROUP BY method ORDER BY method
list.label: Method
list.name: method
list.query: SELECT method FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND method != '' GROUP BY method ORDER BY method

list.definition: SELECT status_msg FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND status_msg != '' GROUP BY status_msg ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 100
list.label: Status message
list.name: status_msg
list.query: SELECT status_msg FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND status_msg != '' GROUP BY status_msg ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT geoip_country FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND geoip_country != '' GROUP BY geoip_country ORDER BY geoip_country
list.label: Country
list.name: geoip_country
list.query: SELECT geoip_country FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND geoip_country != '' GROUP BY geoip_country ORDER BY geoip_country

title: Nauthilus ClickHouse Login Command Center
